subcodes.first_line: O friend of God! Know thou that the friendship [with God] is a light that shineth in the faces of those who have arisen to diffuse the Covenant of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ولی الله اعلم ان الولایه نور یتلئلا فی وجوه الذین قاموا علی نشر میثاق الله
subcodes.subjects: @high station of teachers of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
